name: persona-os
description: Persona OS by The Product Channel — drop-in operating systems for knowledge workers. Each persona ships a complete kit of Claude skills, a CLAUDE.md operating brain, a memory system, and automations. Start with Product Manager OS.

plugins.name: product-manager-os
plugins.description: The product-manager OS that gets better the more you use it: a CLAUDE.md operating brain, a memory that learns your product and team (3-min /setup), and a self-improving loop that watches the work you repeat and builds you custom skills for it. Plus 40+ book-grounded skills across discovery → strategy → execution → launch, live connectors that write your work back to Linear/Notion/Slack, 5 chained workflows, ready-to-wire automations, and bundled getprompts + getskills libraries.
